_mainTitle.title: Main title
_mainTitle.description: Automatically generated main title based on labels and notation.

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.description: Cordra Vocabulary object describing the SKOS ConceptScheme this concept belongs to.

uri.title: Concept URI
uri.description: Canonical URI of this concept (skos:Concept subject). Distinct from the Cordra handle in id.

notation.title: Notation
notation.description: Language-neutral local identifier for this concept (skos:notation), e.g. aat:300011577

terms.title: Terms
terms.description: Terms in different languages, with one preferred label per language (skos:prefLabel / skos:altLabel).

termStatus.title: Term status
termStatus.description: Term status value for this concept.

descriptions.title: Descriptions
descriptions.description: Definitions and scope notes of the concept in different languages.

broader.title: Broader concepts
broader.description: Broader concepts in the same or another scheme (skos:broader). Stored as Cordra handle references.

related.title: Related concepts
related.description: Associative related concepts (skos:related). Stored as Cordra handle references.

equivalent.title: Equivalent concepts
equivalent.description: Equivalent concept links stored as Cordra handle references when resolvable.

use.title: Use
use.description: Preferred concepts to use instead of this concept. Stored as Cordra handle references when resolvable.

usedFor.title: Used for
usedFor.description: Non-preferred concepts that use this concept. Stored as Cordra handle references when resolvable.

exactMatch.title: Exact match
exactMatch.description: Exact match to an equivalent concept in another vocabulary (skos:exactMatch)

closeMatch.title: Close match
closeMatch.description: Close match to a similar concept in another vocabulary (skos:closeMatch)

harvestedSource.title: Harvested source
harvestedSource.description: Source system marker for harvested concepts. Native Cordra-owned concepts omit this field.

harvestedDate.title: Harvested date
harvestedDate.description: Date when this record was last harvested (mirrored concepts only).

queryTerms.title: Query terms
queryTerms.description: Subset tags for harvested lists or enumeration codes.

items.title: Name
items.description: Name of the subset or enumeration code

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: GeoJSON-like geometry for geographical thesaurus concepts. Point coordinates follow GeoJSON order [longitude, latitude] when the CRS is WGS84.

label.title: Term
label.description: The term in the specified language

isAlternative.title: Alternative label
isAlternative.description: Whether this term is an alternative label for its language

kind.title: Kind
kind.description: Whether this is a definition or scope note

scheme.title: Scheme
scheme.description: Short scheme code for harvest and display logic

coordinates.title: Coordinates
coordinates.description: GeoJSON coordinates in [longitude, latitude] order when CRS is WGS84.

crs.title: Coordinate reference system
crs.description: Coordinate reference system for the coordinates, e.g. EPSG:4326.

gridType.title: Grid type
gridType.description: Cordra handle reference to the source grid type concept when available.
